results.title: UnitedHealthcare Competitors: UNH Peers 2026 | Hudson Labs
UnitedHealth and Humana Soar in April: Which Healthcare Stock Is Winning and Why
UnitedHealth or Humana: Which Managed Care Stock Had the Healthiest Returns in April?
Why The UnitedHealth Group (UNH) Story Is Shifting As Regulation And Valuation Pressures Build
UNH: UnitedHealth Group Inc - Stock Price, Quote and News - CNBC

summary_extracted: Key competitors: Humana (HUM), Elevance Health, CVS Health, Cigna, Centene, Molina Healthcare. Humana rose 36% in April (closed at $236.44) vs UNH +37% (closed at $370.48). UNH is up 11.63% YTD vs Humana down 9.14% YTD, showing UNH's relative outperformance. CVS Health collaborated with UNH on prior authorization standardization. Regulatory and valuation pressures cited as emerging risks for the managed care sector broadly.
